headlines.title: Anthropic files for IPO before OpenAI as trillion-dollar startups race to go public
headlines.description: Anthropic said it filed for an initial public stock offering, a surprise start in its race with OpenAI to be the next trillion-dollar AI startup to go public.

headlines.title: Around 1 in 5 young people use AI chatbots for mental health advice, survey finds
headlines.description: Nearly 1 in 5 adolescents and young adults are turning to AI chatbots for advice when they’re sad, angry, nervous or stressed, according to a new study.

headlines.title: Florida sues OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing them of putting profit over safety
headlines.description: Florida’s attorney general says the company misrepresents safety to turn a profit.

headlines.title: Student commencement boos are a sign of wider AI woes
headlines.description: As companies race to weave AI into nearly every industry, some college students are responding with open hostility

headlines.title: Voters Head to Polls in Key States, Setting the Stage for Midterms
headlines.description: Voters are gearing up for a key primaries with razor-tight races in six states, including Iowa where Democrats are hoping to win a Senate seat in the traditionally Republican state. Meanwhile in California, former reality star Spencer Pratt is gaining late momentum in his push to lead Los Angeles, the nation’s second-largest city. NBC’s Liz Kreutz reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump speaks to NBC News amid Iran talks and administration's apparent abandonment of $1.8B fund
headlines.description: President Trump said he would be 'okay' if the Iranian regime refused to return to talks. The administration also appeared to abandon its $1.8 billion anti-weaponization fund. NBC News' Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: Russia targets Kyiv with massive overnight attack
headlines.description: More than a dozen people were killed and hundreds more inured after an overnight barrage of Russian missiles and drones targeted the Ukrainian capital. Russia had previously warned that it intended “systematic strikes” on targets in Kyiv linked to Ukraine’s military, urging foreigners to leave.

headlines.title: Trump to drop controversial 'anti-weaponization' fund
headlines.description: President Trump is expected to make an announcement about plans to drop the Justice Department's "anti-weaponization" fund. NBC News' Melanie Zanona has details on the backlash the fund has faced on Capitol Hill.

headlines.title: TikTok documentary posted by Paris Hilton digs into notorious deepfake pornography website
headlines.description: Paris Hilton and independent journalist Laurie Segall fight the rise of AI-generated deepfakes in a TikTok documentary. It investigates the man believed to be behind a notorious deepfake pornography website. NBC News’ Chloe Melas reports.

headlines.title: Video Shows Moment Blue Origin Rocket Explodes on Launchpad
headlines.description: Stunning video shows the moment Blue Origin’s New Glenn rocket erupts into flames on the launchpad in Cape Canaveral Thursday night, with the blast seen and felt for miles. No injuries were reported but the launch tower was destroyed in the explosion. NBC’s Tom Costello reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: NASA’s Jared Isaacman shares moon base plans
headlines.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman talks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about plans for building a base on the moon, rover designs, and what’s next for the Artemis missions.

headlines.title: Pope Leo issues new warning on artificial intelligence
headlines.description: Pope Leo is making history by wading into the AI debate, warning that people need to be a part of developing the new technology, however it unfolds. NBC News’ Anne Thompson has the story.
